title: h3br 200 GPa full 4x4x4 q electron-phonon (lambda_BZ + omega_log_BZ + Allen-Dynes Tc)

hypothesis.text: h3br at 200 GPa, full-BZ el-ph retains strong coupling (lambda_BZ) while omega_log rises with pressure -> Tc > 200K candidate (campaign first live 200K+ path).
hypothesis.basis: Gamma-only pressure-scan (PR #289): omega_log(P) slope +4.789 K/GPa; 200 GPa Gamma omega_log=1766.4K; all P dynamically stable (imag=0). baseline 69 GPa lambda=4.42, Tc~110K.
hypothesis.outcome: STABLE full-BZ (all 8 IBZ q real, min_freq=5.02 cm-1) AND strong coupling (lambda_BZ=2.16) BUT Tc=158K(mu0.10) < 200K. Gamma-only omega_log 1766K was a 41% over-estimate vs full-BZ Allen-weighted 1046K -> 200K extrapolation does not hold under full el-ph.

method.structure: Im-3m h3br primitive, ibrav=3 BCC, 4 atoms (Br + 3H @ alat-edge midpoints)
method.cell: celldm(1)=6.009113 bohr (LANDED 200 GPa equilibrium, vc-relax press=2000 kbar, PR #289 Gamma-probe; reused, not re-relaxed)

dispatch.note: shared 12-core box with h3cl ph.interp -np 4 (co-existence). NO --oversubscribe.
dispatch.launch: setsid nohup bash run.sh, --bind-to none, timeout SCF 4h / ph 20h
dispatch.wall_time: ~28 min (14:40:09 -> 15:08:33 KST; dense-k SCF JOB DONE in 4s on reused converged cell)
dispatch.d16_dryrun: PASSED (maxstep=2 SCF iterated, E=-32.59 Ry matches prior 8^3 SCF, no directive/basis error)

sigma_plateau.rationale: lambda_BZ peaks at sigma=0.025 (broadening-converged plateau, sigma>=0.025 per d6) then declines; plateau center pick.

verdict_branch_g63.result: STABLE (all IBZ q real) AND Tc=158K < 200K -> GREEN honest data point (omega_log-up effect quantified).
verdict_branch_g63.not_breakthrough_reason: Gamma-only omega_log=1766K over-estimated full-BZ Allen-weighted omega_log (1046K) by 41%; with the true omega_log the 200K extrapolation does not hold. lambda_BZ=2.16 confirms strong coupling but omega_log ceiling (~1046K stable branch) caps Tc per the tropical isocontour wall.

honesty: Gamma-only omega_log=1766K was confirmed a 41% over-estimate; full-BZ Allen-weighted omega_log=1046K is the truth (pre-registered honesty bound b1 realized).
lambda_BZ=2.16 now measured (was unmeasured -> prior Tc extrapolation only).
sigma-plateau honest pick at sigma=0.025 (lambda peaks then declines); no Tc-forcing (d6).
BZ weighting by QE star multiplicities [1,12,6,24,6,12,2,1] (sum=64); uniform-weight first pass gave Tc=116K and was corrected to star-weighted Tc=158K.
RTSC absorbed=false permanently (R4) — candidate-funnel data point, not a wet-lab claim. 200 GPa is high pressure (not ambient).
physical_implication: h3br at 200 GPa is a STABLE full-BZ strong-coupling superconductor (lambda_BZ=2.16, Tc~158K). It does not reach 200K because omega_log saturates near 1046K in the stable branch (tropical isocontour: lambda>1.5 -> Tc~0.353*omega_log). Confirms the N5 wall analysis: stable strong-lambda binary hydrides hit an omega_log ceiling. Pressure raised Tc from ~110K (69 GPa) to ~158K (200 GPa), validating the positive omega_log(P) slope, but the gain is sub-linear in Tc due to the lambda-saturation/omega_log-ceiling trade-off.
